exception.message: [public void integration_Testing.SideBarTest.closeMenu()] has no parameters defined but was found to be using a data provider (either explicitly specified or inherited from class level annotation). Data provider mismatch Method: closeMenu([]) Arguments: [(java.lang.String) standard_user,(java.lang.String) secret_sauce]

exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element
...
is not clickable at point (146, 26). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=142.0.7444.175) Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.8.0-87-generic', java.version: '17.0.17' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [e56fe878365be718dffd3c006eaaf764, clickElement {id=f.62B7FA6205D61B3F53D024770F1B8CE0.d.96A2177E7D905A4B4943A0C94708D574.e.30}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 142.0.7444.175, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 142.0.7444.175 (302067f14a4..., userDataDir: /tmp/.org.chromium.Chromium...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:39747}, goog:processID: 36453, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:39747/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 142.0.7444.175, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on linux (e56fe878365be718dffd3c006eaaf764)] -> class name: bm-cross-button] Session ID: e56fe878365be718dffd3c006eaaf764
